_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin knockdown in human Schwann cells: clues to vestibular schwannoma tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: As assessed by this technique, merlin is depleted by greater than 50% in treated cells compared with controls
resourceName: Rabbit polyclonal anti-merlin (1:100; Santa Cruz Biotechnology, Santa Cruz, CA)
details: Successfully used for immunostaining showing greater than 50% depletion of merlin in treated cells compared to controls
